inputs.label: Hydroxide Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Concentration of hydroxide ions [OH-] in moles per liter. Typical values range from 1e-14 to 1e0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Concentration of hydroxide ions [OH-] in moles per liter. Typical values range from 1e-14 to 1e0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hidroksit iyonları [OH-] konsantrasyonu (mol/L). Tipik değerler 1e-14 ile 1e0 arasındadır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Konzentration der Hydroxidionen [OH-] in Mol pro Liter. Typische Werte reichen von 1e-14 bis 1e0.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Concentration en ions hydroxyde [OH-] en moles par litre. Les valeurs typiques vont de 1e-14 à 1e0.
businessContext_i18n.es: Concentración de iones hidróxido [OH-] en moles por litro. Los valores típicos van de 1e-14 a 1e0.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تركيز أيونات الهيدروكسيد [OH-] بالمول/لتر. تتراوح القيم النموذجية من 1e-14 إلى 1e0.

inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature in degrees Celsius. Used to calculate water autoionization constant pKw. Standard pOH assumes 25°C where Kw = 1e-14.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature in degrees Celsius. Used to calculate water autoionization constant pKw. Standard pOH assumes 25°C where Kw = 1e-14.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Santigrat derece cinsinden sıcaklık. Suyun otoiyonizasyon sabiti pKw'yi hesaplamak için kullanılır. Standart pOH, Kw = 1e-14 olduğu 25°C'yi varsayar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur in Grad Celsius. Wird zur Berechnung der Wasserautoprotolysekonstante pKw verwendet. Standard-pOH geht von 25°C aus, wo Kw = 1e-14.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température en degrés Celsius. Utilisée pour calculer la constante d'autoionisation de l'eau pKw. Le pOH standard suppose 25°C où Kw = 1e-14.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura en grados Celsius. Se utiliza para calcular la constante de autoionización del agua pKw. El pOH estándar asume 25°C donde Kw = 1e-14.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة الحرارة بالدرجات المئوية. تُستخدم لحساب ثابت التأين الذاتي للماء pKw. تفترض pOH القياسية 25 درجة مئوية حيث Kw = 1e-14.

inputs.label: Sample Volume
inputs.businessContext: Volume of the aqueous sample in liters. For reference and scaling calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of the aqueous sample in liters. For reference and scaling calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sulu numunenin litre cinsinden hacmi. Referans ve ölçeklendirme hesaplamaları için.
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumen der wässrigen Probe in Litern. Für Referenz- und Skalierungsberechnungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume de l'échantillon aqueux en litres. Pour référence et calculs de mise à l'échelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen de la muestra acuosa en litros. Para referencia y cálculos de escala.
businessContext_i18n.ar: حجم العينة المائية باللتر. للمرجعية وحسابات القياس.

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty
inputs.businessContext: Relative uncertainty of the hydroxide measurement, expressed as a percentage. For quality assurance documentation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Relative uncertainty of the hydroxide measurement, expressed as a percentage. For quality assurance documentation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hidroksit ölçümünün yüzde olarak ifade edilen bağıl belirsizliği. Kalite güvence dokümantasyonu için.
businessContext_i18n.de: Relative Unsicherheit der Hydroxidmessung, ausgedrückt in Prozent. Für die Qualitätssicherungsdokumentation.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Incertitude relative de la mesure d'hydroxyde, exprimée en pourcentage. Pour la documentation d'assurance qualité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Incertidumbre relativa de la medición de hidróxido, expresada como porcentaje. Para documentación de aseguramiento de calidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدم اليقين النسبي لقياس الهيدروكسيد، معبرًا عنه كنسبة مئوية. لتوثيق ضمان الجودة.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Measurement uncertainty must be between 0 and 100%.
